action.content:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)
action.label: context

action.content:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)

<<Notice of Resignation>>

Subject: Notice of Resignation

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Day, typically two weeks from the date of this email].

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities I have had during my time here. I have learned a great deal and truly appreciate the support and guidance you have provided.

Over the next two weeks, I am fully committed to ensuring a smooth transition. Please let me know how I can best assist with handing over my responsibilities and training my replacement.

Thank you again for the opportunity to be part of the team. I wish you and the company all the best for the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
action.label: response

combination:repeat_prompt.prompt_to_repeat: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
